Luxury condo residences granting owners the option to host 365 days on Airbnb.

38 West Eleventh has reimagined luxury condo home ownership by providing true living flexibility. Each fully furnished residence offers a place to call home and an opportunity to uniquely host on Airbnb.

![Airbnb.png](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/6b7290_bf9941326b3d4dd0ba1095530ad59832~mv2.png/v1/fill/w_108,h_34,al_c,q_85,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/6b7290_bf9941326b3d4dd0ba1095530ad59832~mv2.png)

Fully Furnished Studios & 1-Bedroom Residences

​

Hosting is subject to rules and local laws. The ability to host 365 days a year is subject to the City of Miami’s (the “City”) Determination No. 2019-01 (the “Determination”). Any change in the Determination or the City’s interpretation of the Determination may cause the ability to host 365 days a year to be limited and/or restricted as mandated by the City.

# 38 West Eleventh Residences Miami

[38 NW 11th Street, Miami, FL 33136](https://maps.app.goo.gl/7cowJxTmeZKmTV1i8)

38 West Eleventh Residences Miami is a 44-story luxury condo residence located in the heart of Miami’s District 11, also known as Park West. Designed by internationally renowned architecture firm Seiger Suarez Architects, West Eleventh is infused with artistic attention throughout, and each fully finished and furnished studio and 1-bedroom residence is thoughtfully designed.

Enjoy access to unlimited options for entertainment, such as upscale and local shopping, clubs and lounges, and world-class food and beverage concepts by Michelin-Star chefs. Residents of West Eleventh will also have the option to host their home year round on AirBnb.
